---
title: "About"
page-layout: article
---

**BenDiagrams** is a place where I have fun, learn, and share what I've learned. I write about sports analytics, economic trends, and code experiments - all with a focus on real data, reuseable code, and insights.

## What I Write About

- **Data Science**: Python tutorials, Machine Learning, visualization, tools and workflows
- **Sports Analytics**: Betting models, player props, performance predictions
- **Economic Trends**: Inflation tracking, CPI analysis, macro indicators
- **Code Experiments**: API integrations, Python tutorials, MLOps workflows

Every post includes reproducible code, real data sources, and interactive visualizations.

## The Stack

- **Language**: Python (Pandas, Plotly, scikit-learn)
- **Tools**: Jupyter, Quarto, VS Code
- **Publishing**: GitHub Pages, automated via GitHub Actions
- **Data Sources**: College Football Data API, NBA API, FRED, odds providers


## Contact

- **Medium**: [@ben.g.ballard](https://medium.com/@ben.g.ballard)
- **LinkedIn**: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-ballard-44969313/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-ballard-44969313/)
- **GitHub**: [https://github.com/ballard11](https://github.com/ballard11)

Or just drop a comment on any post.

---
    
## Disclaimer

Nothing here is financial advice. All code and analysis is for educational purposes.
